blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 477 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
